title.en: To break through with the Ancestral Method is t...

content.en:
Whether there is a superior soul ancestor or a non-superior domain ancestor, the way to impact the ancestor is almost the same, that is, to break through with the ancestor method to become the ancestor.

The Ancestral Dharma is the ultimate of the Dao, the origin of the Dao, and the embodiment of the Dao.

To break through with the Ancestral Method is to turn oneself into the Tao.

The Space Ancestor Method is to let the body turn into the space origin ancestor body, break the limit of the non-superior soul body or the non-superior domain body, and achieve the ancestor body.

The Ancestor Body of the Superior Domain Ancestor is the body of the flesh, and the Ancestor Body of the Ancestor of the Achievement of the Soul Ancestor of the Superior Soul Ancestor is the soul body.

But in fact, it's all about the same, once the ancestral body is achieved, the soul is both the body, and the body is the soul, both of which are extremely powerful, and they are all powerful in all aspects.

However, the accumulation of a Peerless Peak Domain Ancestor or a Soul Ancestor at the Peerless Level is different, and once it breaks through, its strength will naturally be different.

The accumulation of Ye Tian's copy body is also enough, although it is not as good as the main body, but it is far superior to other non-superior domain ancestors.

Therefore, once Ye Tian becomes an ancestor, his strength will inevitably surpass that of ordinary ancestors.

......

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's body began to be reshaped according to the mystery of the Space Ancestor Method, transforming towards the Space Ancestor body.

Ye Tian, who had already thoroughly eaten the Space Ancestor Method, could naturally easily condense the Space Ancestor body.

In the darkness, the origin power of the Dark Forbidden Domain poured into Ye Tian's body.

Ye Tian's condensed space ancestor body was not the same as other ancestors, so his cultivation Dao did not conflict with others.

A path only allows one person to become an ancestor, of course, the space ancestor path is also divided into many kinds, but if the same ancestor method becomes the ancestor, it is the same ancestor dao, once it breaks through, it will be repulsed, and it will directly be shattered by the opponent's ancestor dao.

Therefore, once he broke through to the Ancestor Realm, in the future, when others cultivated his Spatial Ancestor Method, they would not be able to become an Ancestor, but they could fuse the Incomplete Ancestor Dao and become a half-step Ancestor.

Endless energy poured into Ye Tian's copy body, helping him achieve the body of the Ancestor.

Outside the Dark Souls.

One of the Ancestors looked at the Dark Soul Domain, and they all showed shocked expressions.

"Someone attacked the ancestor, how could it be so fast?"

One Ancestor after another was shocked.

They guessed that there would be a superior peak domain ancestor who would attack the ancestor, once they were ready, they had the hope of becoming the ancestor in the Dark Soul Domain, maybe because of the way of the domain ancestor, there was no way to take charge of the Dark Soul Domain, but once an ancestor was born, it could affect the direction of the Dark Soul Domain.

If the Superior Domain Ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain gave birth to an Ancestor, he could use the Ancestral Bloodline to continuously influence the Dark Soul Domain, create countless destruction races, and then destroy the areas of the Dark Soul Domain to create a second Destruction Domain.

If the Dark Sacred Domain gave birth to the Ancestors, then the Dark Soul Domain tore the way of the Domain Ancestors, but the Domain Ancestors cultivated faster.

But there is no superior peak domain ancestor, it stands to reason that there is no way to be promoted to the ancestor so quickly, and the suppression of a dark holy land is not a joke.

"No, it's not the Supreme Domain Ancestor who impacts the Ancestor Realm, it's the Peerless Soul Ancestor !!!"

The Ancestors reacted.

Soon, there was a higher-level domain ancestor to investigate, and after a while, the target was locked.

In front of the Ancestor of Destruction, a Superior Domain Ancestor appeared from the Dark Soul Domain and reported: "Lord Destruction Ancestor, the person who attacked the Ancestor is the Aoba Soul Ancestor of the Human Race!"

"Terran, Aoba Soul Ancestor, the genius of the Terran Race who entered the Dark Soul Domain, transformed from a half-step Domain Ancestor to a Half-Step Soul Ancestor in a short period of time, and now he is impacting the Ancestor Realm?

The Ancestors of Destruction were shocked and changed.

In such a short period of a trillion years, someone has ascended from the beginning of cultivation to the Ancestor Realm?

Even he couldn't do it at the beginning, and the Holy Ancestor of the Dark Sanctuary couldn't do it either.

The Holy Ancestor of the Dark Sanctuary was unhindered, and concentrated the luck of the Dark Sanctuary in one, and finally broke through to the Ancestor Realm in the 28th Realm Year.

And a trillion years is just a fraction of a realm year.

For such a short period of time, and he was still a genius of the human race, not from the disciples of the Holy Ancestor, this made him unbelievable.

On the side of the Dark Sanctuary, the Holy Ancestor and a group of other Ancestors were also stunned.

The Zhan Ancestor and the Realm Ancestor of the Battle Gate were also very confused, why did the human race suddenly have such a demonic existence?

If you don't look at the combat power, just look at the achievement of becoming the ancestor, it will be even more demonic than Ye Tian!

At the very least, Ye Tian has been cultivating for so long, and he has not become an ancestor so far.

......

"Wanfa War Ancestor, what is going on with that Qingye Soul Ancestor of your human race, why did it suddenly impact the Ancestor?"

Zhan Zu asked one of Ye Tian's incarnations.

When a Superior Domain Ancestor enters the Dark Soul Domain, he will leave an incarnation behind and report the situation inside at any time.

"I guess it's an accident!"

Ye Tian said.

It was impossible for him to say that it was his own copy body, otherwise other ancestors would specifically target his own body, which would not be good!

Once the body falls, it really falls!

Zhan Zu was completely jealous at this moment, the human race gave birth to Ye Tian such a demonic genius, and he would almost inevitably succeed in the future, but he didn't expect to give birth to an even more demonic Aoba Soul Ancestor, and he should be called Aoba Ancestor in the future.

The point is, once the Aoba Ancestor breaks through successfully, then he can take charge of a part of the Dark Soul Domain!

In this way, the Aoba Ancestor can be called truly invincible inside the Dark Soul Domain!

Over time.

Ye Tian's transformation speed is getting faster and faster, and some people are trying to interrupt Ye Tian's breakthrough, but Ye Tian's body is nearby, and once there is a superior domain ancestor who makes a move, they will be killed by Ye Tianzhen one after another.

Even the ancient Peerless Peak Domain Ancestor was not the opponent of Ye Tian's body.

Although Ye Tian's body was not the opponent of the Ancestor, even a half-step Ancestor comparable to the Six-Pattern Silent Annihilation Clan was not Ye Tian's opponent.

Millions of years have finally passed.

On this day, Ye Tian's copy body finally completely condensed the body of the ancestor, stepped into the ancestor level, and became a space ancestor.

Outside the Dark Souls Domain, the Battle Gate is stationed.

Ye Tian's incarnation was discussing a matter with Zhan Ancestor and Realm Ancestor.

"War Ancestor, Realm Ancestor, Dark Soul Domain currently has two Peerless Peak Domain Ancestors who are impacting the Ancestor Realm, one of them is the Ancestor of the Dark Destruction Domain, and the other is a Domain Ancestor of the Dark Saint Domain, do you want to kill them?"

"Kill!"

Jiezu nodded.

Although everyone was in alliance before, now that the Silent Annihilation Clan has been destroyed, everyone is an enemy.

Therefore, the battle gate naturally did not want other forces to give birth to ancestors.

"Ten Thousand Law Battle Ancestor, but the Aoba Ancestor of your human race can only do it once, because the Ancestor is not allowed to do anything to the Ancestor of the Superior Domain, this is the default rule. The Aoba Ancestor had just broken through and didn't know this rule, so he could do it, and the other Ancestors couldn't say anything. But once you know it, you can't do it. Therefore, the Aoba Ancestor must do it immediately. "

Zhan Zu reminded.

"Got it!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Inside the Dark Soul Domain, Ye Tian's copy body sensed the position of the two Peerless Peak Domain Ancestors who were trying to impact the Ancestor by holding the Dark Soul Domain.

The next moment.

Ye Tian Yi thought that he came to the side of the two peerless peak domain ancestors, and grabbed them with one hand.

No matter how much they resisted, it would be of no avail.

Bang!!!

The two Peerless Peak Domain Ancestors were easily wiped out by Ye Tian, and they were annihilated without the power to resist.
